title: wolftpm-tss Error loses symbolic TPM error context
description: wolftpm-tss/src/error.rs Error::Transport { code: i32 } stores only a raw integer with no symbolic name mapping (unlike wolftpm::error::Error which has tpm_rc_name). When a TSS transport operation fails, the error display is just 'wolfTPM transport error 0x00000101' with no hint of the symbolic name. The From<TssError> conversion also discards the TssError structure entirely, losing even the source type information. This makes debugging transport failures in the TSS path substantially harder than in the direct wolftpm path.
